temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a hospital room, Rachel, wearing a white hospital gown, lies in bed with a distressed and pained expression. Ross, in a beige shirt and tie, leans over her, looking concerned as he listens to a doctor off-screen. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense moment during Rachel's labor, establishing her pain and Ross's worried presence by her side.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Rachel's tone is distressed and confused; Ross's is calm and informative. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:05) A nurse, wearing a white lab coat over a striped shirt, stands by the bed. She looks at Ross with a serious expression and informs him that Rachel is about to become a mother. (Storyline: The nurse confirms the gravity of the situation, moving the plot forward from a general sense of discomfort to the imminent arrival of a baby.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: The nurse's tone is serious and matter-of-fact. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
